the very big place above all other places; when someone is not inside something, this someone can see it above them; the sun is in this place; at some times people can see other things in this place, some of these things move

something of one kind happens to someone's body for some time: the body does not move; this someone cannot see, cannot hear many things, does not know what happens in the place where the body is; it happens to all people at some times: people want it after they do many things for a long time
someone's mouth moves in a way of one kind, its two sides move; it happens when this someone feels something good; when other people see it, they can know this someone feels something good

one big something; it is very far above all places; at some times people can see it above them; when people can see it, people can see many other things because of it; when people cannot see it, people cannot see many things

a living thing of one kind; it is big; it is in one place at all times, it cannot move; part of it is inside the ground; other parts are far above, people can see these parts; there are very many of these living things in some places

someone moves in a way of one kind: the body is above the ground, at all times one part of the body touches it; because someone moves like this, this someone can be in another place after some time; people move like this at many times

something of one kind; there is very much of it in some places; it can move; when it moves, people can hear it; when the body touches it, someone feels it; if for a long time some of it is not inside someone's body, this someone cannot live
someone of one kind, not a child: this someone lived for a long time before now; a child can be born from inside the body of someone of this kind
